description.en: Draft version of the PROMESS ontology prepared for conceptual modeling, review, documentation, and further refinement.
description.fr: Version préliminaire de l’ontologie PROMESS préparée pour la modélisation conceptuelle, la revue, la documentation et l’affinement ultérieur.

publisher.value: Université de Montpellier, LIRMM; INSERM, PhyMedExp

Psychological measurement evaluates psychological factor. Suggested cardinality: MesurePsychologique -> FacteurPsychologique = 0..*.
Dietary regimen descriptor. Suggested cardinality: ExpositionAlimentaire -> RegimeAlimentaire = 0..1.
Each participant belongs to one study. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> Etude = 1.
Biological measurement targets biomarker. Suggested cardinality: MesureBiologique -> Biomarqueur = 0..*.
Inverse of participant group membership. Suggested cardinality: GroupeDeParticipants -> Participant = 0..*.
Inverse air agent relation. Suggested cardinality: AgentExposition -> ExpositionAir = 0..*.
Biomarker unit. Suggested cardinality: MesureBiologique -> xsd:string = 0..1.
Participant psychological factor. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> FacteurPsychologique = 0..*.
Participant group membership. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> GroupeDeParticipants = 0..1.
Each biological sample comes from one participant. Suggested cardinality: PrelevementBiologique -> Participant = 1.
Event date. Suggested cardinality: Evenement -> xsd:date = 0..1.
Exposure agent for occupational exposure. Suggested cardinality: ExpositionProfessionnelle -> AgentExposition = 0..*.
Inverse of group inclusion in study. Suggested cardinality: GroupeDeParticipants -> Etude = 0..*.
Interaction between risk factors. Suggested cardinality: FacteurDeRisque -> FacteurDeRisque = 0..*.
Each visit must have exactly one visit type. Suggested cardinality: Visite -> TypeDeVisite = 1.
Unique participant identifier. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> xsd:string = 1.
Optional symptom intensity value. Suggested cardinality: Symptome -> xsd:decimal = 0..1.
Imaging exam linked to one visit. Suggested cardinality: ExamenImagerie -> Visite = 1.
Visit includes biological samples. Suggested cardinality: Visite -> PrelevementBiologique = 0..*.
Text result if needed. Suggested cardinality: Mesure -> xsd:string = 0..1.
Optional symptom presence flag. Suggested cardinality: Symptome -> xsd:boolean = 0..1.
Inverse imaging-measure sign relation. Suggested cardinality: SigneClinique -> MesureImagerie = 0..*.
Event may occur during a visit. Suggested cardinality: Evenement -> Visite = 0..1.
Inverse chemical agent relation. Suggested cardinality: AgentExposition -> ExpositionChimique = 0..*.
Participant symptoms. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> Symptome = 0..*.
Evolution result targets one condition. Suggested cardinality: ResultatDEvolution -> ConditionMedicale = 1.
Sample used for biomarker analysis. Suggested cardinality: PrelevementBiologique -> Biomarqueur = 0..*.
Each measurement concerns one participant in this conceptual model. Suggested cardinality: Mesure -> Participant = 1.
Inverse dietary habit descriptor relation. Suggested cardinality: HabitudeAlimentaire -> ExpositionAlimentaire = 0..*.
Study includes participant groups. Suggested cardinality: Etude -> GroupeDeParticipants = 0..*.

Psychological score value. Suggested cardinality: MesurePsychologique -> xsd:decimal = 0..1.

Inverse symptom relation. Suggested cardinality: Symptome -> Participant = 0..*.
Study contains visits. Suggested cardinality: Etude -> Visite = 0..*.
Inverse occupational agent relation. Suggested cardinality: AgentExposition -> ExpositionProfessionnelle = 0..*.
Participant may have many visits. Suggested cardinality: Participant -> Visite = 0..*.
Degree of processing descriptor. Suggested cardinality: ExpositionAlimentaire -> NiveauTransformation = 0..1.

Inverse of visit temporality. Suggested cardinality: TempsSuivi -> Visite = 0..*.
